summary: A single unit test failed: DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion asserted that the owner version was not incremented but it was.
root_cause: The test org.hibernate.orm.test.version.db.DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion failed with an assertion: 'owner version not incremented ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>'.

suggested_fix: Investigate the failing test org.hibernate.orm.test.version.db.DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion (see the report at hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html). Reproduce locally with Gradle: ./gradlew :hibernate-core:test --tests "org.hibernate.orm.test.version.db.DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion" and inspect why the owner version is incrementing (update test expectation or fix the code that affects version increments).
